title: Pre-Handover Testing Checklist
subtitle: Django Staff Biodata Management System — Customary Court of Appeal, FCT

sections.label: 1. Authentication & Session Management
tests: Redirects to admin dashboard; user name shown in header
Login with valid HR Officer credentials
Redirects to HR dashboard; menu limited to HR scope
Redirects to read-only dashboard; no edit/delete buttons visible
Error: 'Invalid username or password'; no system info leaked
Login with valid username + wrong password
Same generic error; failed attempt counter increments
Client and server-side validation errors shown
Account locked for configured cooldown (e.g., 15 min); admin alerted
Login blocked even with correct password; message 'Account temporarily locked'
Account immediately usable; reset event in audit log
Session destroyed; redirect to login; back button does not restore session
Session timeout — idle for configured duration (e.g., 30 min)
Next request redirects to login with 'Session expired' notice
Concurrent session — same user logs in from second browser
Behavior matches policy (allow or kick previous); documented in user guide
Reset link emailed; link single-use; expires after configured window
Rejects weak passwords (min length, mixed case, digits, symbols)
403 Forbidden; attempt logged in audit trail
RBAC — HR Officer attempts user management URL
CSRF token present on all POST forms
HTTP redirects to HTTPS; Secure & HttpOnly cookies set

sections.label: 2. Staff Management (CRUD, Photo, Bulk Import)
tests: Create staff — all required fields valid
Record saved; success message; redirect to staff detail
Create staff — missing required field (e.g., DOB)
Form rejects; error indicator beside field
Create staff — duplicate Staff ID / File No
Create staff — invalid date (DOB in future, employment > today)
Create staff — DOB makes hire age < 18 or > 60
Warning or rejection per business rule
All fields render; computed fields (age, years of service) accurate
Page navigation works; counts correct; sort persists across pages
Changes saved; old/new values captured in audit log
Update — invalid value (e.g., non-numeric in salary)
Record marked inactive; hidden from default lists; recoverable
Confirmation prompt; record removed; audit entry created
Button hidden in UI; direct URL returns 403
Photo saved and displayed on profile
Photo upload — oversized file (> max size)
Rejected; MIME and extension both validated
Old file removed or archived; new photo shown
Bulk import — valid CSV with 50 rows
All rows imported; success summary (50 created, 0 errors)
Valid rows imported; invalid rows reported with row number + reason; downloadable error report
Bulk import — duplicate Staff IDs within file
Bulk import — duplicate vs existing DB records
Skipped or updated per documented behavior; logged
Template downloads with correct column headers + sample row
Failure mid-import does not leave partial data (or behavior documented)

sections.label: 3. Auto-Calculations — Promotion & Retirement (5 sample records)
sections.narrative: Rules under test: Promotion eligibility = 3 years on current grade since last promotion date. Retirement = earlier of (a) age 60 from DOB, or (b) 35 years from first appointment date. Reference date: 2026-05-16.
tests: Verify Promotion Due Date for S1
Verify Promotion Due Date for S2
Verify Promotion Due Date for S3
Verify Promotion Due Date for S4
Verify Promotion Due Date for S5
New due date = last promotion + 3 years; saved immediately
Earlier of new age-60 vs 35-yr from first appt
Retirement updates if 35-yr is the driver
(Today − first appt) in years and months; accurate
Computed from DOB to today; updates after midnight on birthday
Boundary — staff hitting 3-yr promotion mark today
Retirement computes deterministically (Feb 28 vs Mar 1 documented)
Staff with no Last Promotion (never promoted)
Promotion due = first appointment + 3 yrs (or documented rule)
All derived fields refreshed; runtime acceptable; no corruption

sections.label: 4. Search & Filter
tests: Search by Staff ID / File No
Treated as literal string; no records leaked; attempt logged
Rendered as text; script does not execute
All filters reset; full list returned
Exported file contains only filtered rows

sections.label: 5. Notifications & Alerts
tests: Flagged red/highlighted on dashboard and staff list
Promotion alert email to HR (if enabled)
Email delivered with staff name, ID, due date
UI shows which rule triggers the date
Removed from unread list; badge decrements
Alerts recompute every day; no duplicates
Alert appears immediately if new date moves staff into window
HR sees HR-relevant alerts; Viewer sees none or read-only

sections.label: 6. Audit Trail
tests: Entry with username, timestamp, IP, success/failure
Action=CREATE, target=Staff:<id>, actor, before=null, after=full record
Update staff logged with field-level diff
Old and new values captured per changed field
Action=DELETE, includes snapshot of deleted record
Action=UPLOAD with file name, size, uploader
Single batch entry + per-row outcomes accessible
Action=EXPORT with report type, format, filters, user
Old role → new role, actor, target user
Edit/delete buttons absent; direct API attempts return 403
Audit log timestamps in Africa/Lagos timezone
Times match server clock and user expectation
Filters by user, date, action return correct subset
403 events captured with URL, user, IP

sections.label: 7. Reports — PDF & Excel Export
tests: PDF opens; CCA letterhead; selected columns; pagination; page numbers
.xlsx opens; correct headers; data types preserved
Filtered to upcoming/overdue; sorted by due date; signatory block
Same data; sortable; no merged-cell artifacts
Includes driver column (Age 60 / 35-yr) and retirement date
Date column formatted as date, not text
Group totals and grand total accurate
One-page printable; photo embedded; all fields present
Date range and user filter honored
Report respects active filters on screen
Export = filtered view, not full DB
Completes without timeout; file size reasonable
Render correctly in both PDF and Excel
Header-only file with 'No records' note; no crash

sections.label: 8. Security
tests: Direct URL to unauthorized edit page
Server-side re-check; blocked if not permitted
SQL injection on search and login fields
Parameterized queries; no DB error leaked
File upload — SVG with embedded script
File upload — path traversal in filename
Uploaded files served safely (attachment or safe inline)
Browser does not execute as HTML
Session cookie flags — HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite
Protected pages redirect to login after timeout
No stack traces; generic error pages
Requests with foreign Host header rejected
No plaintext or weak hashes in DB

sections.label: 9. Performance (Target: 300+ Staff Records)
sections.narrative: Seed database with at least 300 staff records (use bulk import or factory script). Record actual measured times in the Notes column on the printed/PDF copy.
tests: Staff list — default page (25 per page)
DB query count per page (Django Debug Toolbar)
No N+1; < 20 queries on list pages
No leak in top / Task Manager
